trending_themes.theme: Multi-comeback strategy: Mono single + July album
trending_themes.evidence: Released digital single 'Mono' (feat. skaiwater) January 27, 2026. CUBE confirmed July 2026 album release April 13.

trending_themes.theme: Historic Taipei Dome — first K-pop girl group
trending_themes.evidence: During 'Syncopation' World Tour (Feb 27 onward), became first K-pop girl group to perform at Taipei Dome.
February 21, 2026 solo persona unveiled with 'Ice Blue Rabbit' — deliberately contradicts known traits to challenge herself artistically.
Confirmed for Lollapalooza Chicago July 31-August 2, 2026. Positions group alongside Jennie as leading K-pop act at mainstream US festivals.

annotation_hooks: Soyeon's 'icebluerabbit' parallels BTS RM's introspective solo work — leader using nom de plume to explore vulnerability contradicting public persona; 'ice' vs 'hot' binary inversion echoes Queencard's 'I'm a queen' sophistication
First K-pop girl group at Taipei Dome + Lollapalooza debut = global spatial expansion vs. NewJeans' stationary legal battles — movement equals momentum
Sustained output (January single → July album) during world tour demonstrates production capacity rivaling BTS
raw_headlines: (G)I-DLE First K-pop Girl Group at Taipei Dome
